name: datahub-trust-audit
description: Statistical trust auditing for DataHub. Judges whether a metric/model built on a dataset is trustworthy (temporal/target/group leakage, overfit, calibration) and writes the verdict + a 0-100 Trust Score back to the graph as assertions, incidents, tags, and a typed structured property. Extends the canonical Data Quality Agent pattern with the statistical-honesty layer the shipped skills don't cover.
